Plot marginal means with error bars

Source: R/plot_means.R
plot.rtmb_lsmeans.Rd

Plot method for rtmb_lsmeans objects.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'rtmb_lsmeans'
plot(
  x,
  y,
  error_bar = "se",
  col = NULL,
  main = NULL,
  xlab = NULL,
  ylab = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

x

An rtmb_lsmeans object.

y

Ignored.

error_bar

Type of error bar ("se" or "ci").

col

Color of the bars.

main

Plot title.

xlab

X axis label.

ylab

Y axis label.

...

Additional arguments passed to barplot.
